query:
SELECT id, sourceSpreadsheetId, sourceSheetName, createdAt FROM import_batch_backups WHERE backupJson LIKE '%1.01300001569%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT se.id, se.productId, se.stationCode, se.eventType, se.createdAt FROM station_events se WHERE CAST(se.payload AS CHAR) LIKE '%1.01300001569%' ORDER BY se.id DESC LIMIT 20;
